Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension

Class Extensions.AbstractRealExtension

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension.Extensions.AbstractExtension
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension.Extensions.AbstractRealExtension
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaExtension
Direct Known Subclasses:
Extensions.Real, Extensions.RealEmpty, Extensions.RealPlus, Extensions.RealZero
Enclosing class:
Extensions
private abstract static class Extensions.AbstractRealExtension extends Extensions.AbstractExtension
Common abstraction for extensions about real numbers.
